channel.title: Projects on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on My Blog

item.title: Manage backup
item.description: • Basic idea is this I will use rclone to backup my folder onto cloud and automate it with bash

item.title: personal_blog
item.description:
Personal Blog

  • day-1 : Created minimal backend for blog curd operations

    • Technology used: Gin for manages routes, Gorm for managing database operations
    • Researched about gin and gorm for their basic usage

  • day-2 : Started Creating Frontend for managing UI of blogs

    • Technology used: Vite@React framework for UI with typescript

  • day-3 : Started Creating routes for frontend Technology used: react-router-dom for managing routes in frontend side

  • day-4 : Created minimal responsive looking site Technology used: juse normal css

item.title: poll-app
item.description:
Plan

A simple polling app where user can create poll and add different different users and ejoy polls in realtime

Date - 18-1-2025

Day-1 Already there’s setup initial setup for frontend and for backend i’am gonna use Go-lang with gorilla/websocket - [x] Setup backend and frontend - [ ] Creating module of weboscket in golang-backend.

Day-2 setup are ready first I’am going to work on backend creating modules for websocket and stuff day-3 Learned about basics of goroutine for managing multiple rooms in backend. day-4 Did nothing day-5
